title.ko: 볼링장; 볼링게임; 보치아; 론볼스; 바가텔(bagatelie); 당구(작은 가동체를 이용하는 실내게임, 예, 공, A63F 7/00)
title.en: BOWLING GAMES, e.g. SKITTLES, BOCCE OR BOWLS; INSTALLATIONS THEREFOR; BAGATELLE OR SIMILAR GAMES; BILLIARDS (balls A63B0037000000)

title.ko: 볼링 게임을 위한 설치, 예. 볼링장 또는 보체 코트(볼링 그린 A63C 19/00)
title.en: Installations for bowling games, e.g. bowling-alleys or bocce courts (bowling greens A63C0019000000)
collapsible; portable
Form or material of the surface; Pin-stands integral with the surface
Adjusting apparatus; Stands for players
Tracks for returning or circulating the balls

title.ko: 탁자 볼링 게임; 소형 볼링장; 볼링게임(핀 게임 A63D 7/00)
title.en: Table bowling games; Miniature bowling-alleys; Bowling games (games of pins A63D0007000000)
Arrangement of devices for propelling or projecting the balls
Accessories for bowling-alleys or table alleys
Apparatus for trapping or lifting the balls; Separate devices for returning the balls
Indicating devices
Pin stands
Arrangements for setting-up or taking away pins
the pins being assembled in right order before setting down
Apparatus for cleaning balls, pins, or alleys
Games of pins, e.g. ninepins with tethered balls
Pins
Bagatelle or similar games

title.ko: 당구, 예. 캐논당구 또는 포켓당구(바가텔 A63D 13/00)
title.en: Billiards, e.g. carom billiards or pocket billiards; Billiard tables (bagatelle A63D0013000000)
Billiard tables adapted to rest on ordinary tables or the like

title.ko: 다른 테이블 또는 유사물로 바꿀 수 있는 당구대(침대가 되는 것 A47C 17/62)
title.en: Billiard tables convertible into other tables, or the like (into beds A47C0017620000)
Cushions or fastenings therefor
Cues
Apparatus for holding or handing-up cues
Tip fastenings
Means for roughening the cue-tips
Chalk holders
Scoring or registering devices
